reviews.review_msg: You can tell that Maya is a caring soul. Even though you could easily skip most classes and still get a good grade, I found myself wanting to attend each one. This is a great class about life circumstances and the health of society and it makes you think outside the box. The world would be a better place if everyone was required to take this class

I cannot say enough of Maya Gislason! I did not think it would be possible to adore a prof more. It is only half way through the semester and I was so inclined to get on here and write a review because she is that PHENOMENAL!

You can tell that Maya is a caring soul. Even though you could easily skip most classes and still get a good grade, I found myself wanting to attend each one. This is a great class about life circumstances and the health of society and it makes you think outside the box. The world would be a better place if everyone was required to take this class

I cannot say enough of Maya Gislason! I did not think it would be possible to adore a prof more. It is only half way through the semester and I was so inclined to get on here and write a review because she is that PHENOMENAL!

The class itself is easy. It just requires a lot of work because the homeworks are quite long. You have to pass 4 CCEs which should be quite easy if you read and understand the definitions before taking them. The midterm was fair. Overall I really liked the class but wish the workload was a little lower.

Worst prof ever!!!! not giving out answers  of hw and his lecture is totally confusing. the required textbook is useless since he is not teaching in the way that matching the book (both chapters and notations, and even concepts). So u don't know what is consider as a 'correct answer' and of course u don't know how to pass even u learnt the content.
The best prof. I have ever had. Totally openminded, incredibly insightful, uses a variety of teaching methods and tools. Brilliant, sympathetic, wonderful in every way.

I loved her so much, she is the best proff. You have to do readings because there are quizzes every week. But she is a fair marker. Her assignments are long but you will have enough time to finish them. She moved our deadline shead to accommodate all students. Her lectures are interesting and you would WANT to participate. Be careful of apa.

Jennifer Wong was the best professor in my entire university years. Her grading criteria is clear (which means no favoritism) and she is super fair on the exams. Her class will reflect the amount of study you did. Do not expect to get an easy A- if you want A, go and study. Simple. She is an amazing prof who wants her students to learn.
